items.title: No senior data engineer staffed for Meridian Health's next milestone — and delivery health is already at-risk

items.note: Joins to the corpus: delivery-health already flags this engagement's next milestone at-risk. The resourcing gap is the likely cause — surfacing them together turns a symptom into a fix (staff the role).
